title: apium podagraria
intro: Apium podagraria, also known as Bitter Cicely or Wild Parsnip, is a biennial plant in the carrot family Apiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as relieving digestive problems, reducing inflammation, and aiding in respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Apium podagraria can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, coughs, and other infections.
